name: aspens
description: Keep coding-agent context accurate as your codebase changes

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  📌 aspens v0.7.2: Nested-project layouts (e.g. `.NET ~/apps/MyApp/MyApp/MyApp.csproj`) now yield first-class domains instead of a single wrapper domain. Pretty-printed `scan` also shows domains for C#/Java/Swift/PHP/Elixir projects.
     Re-run `aspens doc init` if a prior scan came up empty or under-detailed.

  🌲 aspens is in active development — please keep it up to date.
     Run into issues? Let us know: https://github.com/aspenkit/aspens/issues
'
